abstract: Promotes code between environments (dev → staging → main) by opening a PR from the correct source branch. Enforces the Gitflow promotion chain — staging only accepts PRs from dev, main only from staging. Resolves branch names (dev/development, staging/stg, main/master) from an optional deploy block in .asome/config.json, falling back to auto-detection via git remote branches. Never direct-pushes; always PR-first.
